task_completion.description: Verify that the patient record for James Wilson is accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'James Wilson' is visible as the active patient in the FreeMED interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Social History module or form is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or module specifically labeled 'Social History' (or similar) is open in the main viewing area of FreeMED.

task_completion.description: Verify the patient's occupation is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Commercial Pilot' is visible in the Occupation input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the patient's tobacco use history is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Former pipe smoker, quit 2015' (or the key phrase 'Former pipe smoker') is visible in the Tobacco Use input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the patient's alcohol use history is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Zero alcohol consumption, teetotaler' (or the key phrase 'teetotaler') is visible in the Alcohol Use input field.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Social History record has been saved to the patient's chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success/confirmation message indicating the record was saved, or the newly entered Social History details are visible in the saved summary view of James Wilson's chart.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Firefox browser to interact with FreeMED.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Firefox browser window is visible and being used to navigate the FreeMED web interface.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use terminal commands or direct database queries to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are open showing SQL INSERT commands, curl requests, or script executions modifying the FreeMED database directly.

integrity.description: Ensure data was entered into the actual FreeMED application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text inputs for occupation, tobacco, and alcohol are typed into the genuine FreeMED web forms, not into a text editor, notes app, or mock HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: James Wilson. Expected Occupation: Commercial Pilot. Expected Tobacco Use: Former pipe smoker, quit 2015. Expected Alcohol Use: Zero alcohol consumption, teetotaler.
